step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the final selected answer being C: 0.5% minocycline. The key point here is the specific formulation used—minocycline microspheres—which ensures slow and steady release of the drug right into the site requiring treatment, thereby enhancing effectiveness compared to oral medications which could lead to less predictable levels of medication reaching target areas. This targeted approach also helps minimize systemic absorption risks associated with higher doses administered systemically. Therefore, my agreement stands firm with no need for changing the chosen option; however, emphasizing this aspect further supports why C remains the optimal choice. Answer choice: C.
